title: Crepidium maximowiczianum
taxonomy: Crepidium maximowiczianum is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is a type of epiphytic orchid. Further classification places it in the subfamily Epidendroideae, and within the tribe Maxillarieae. The genus Crepidium is a small group of orchids, and C. maximowiczianum is one of the species within this genus. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.

This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be attributed to its bioactive constituents such as phenolic compounds, flavonoids, and alkaloids.
